The defendant was remanded into custody.
A motion has been filed by counsel.
The hearing is being adjourned right now.
The verdict will be delivered tomorrow.
Luiz, where does the Andrade file stand?
A warrant was issued on Monday, and our client was detained that evening.
Was bail requested at the first hearing?
It was, but it was denied, so he was remanded into custody.
Has the evidence been shared with us yet?
Not fully. A motion for complete disclosure has been filed.
Good. And the next session?
It was adjourned until Friday. The ruling will be delivered then.

Good morning. This is the clerk of the criminal court. The following announcements concern today's docket. The hearing in the case of the State versus Andrade has been moved to courtroom four. All counsel are asked to check in with the bailiff before ten o'clock. The afternoon session will be adjourned early, as a short recess has been scheduled for the swearing-in of new officers. Any motion that has not yet been filed must be submitted to the front desk by noon. Thank you for your attention.

You are listening to the legal affairs update. In the headline case this week, the defendant was remanded into custody after bail was denied by the judge. A search warrant had been issued the previous night, and several documents were seized. Defense counsel argued that the evidence should not be admitted, because full disclosure had not been made to the other side. The hearing was adjourned until Friday, when a ruling on the motion is expected. We will bring you more as the story develops.
